svg.metadata:
{"type":"flowgraph","mermaid":"flowchart LR
 A[new MeadowGraphClient]
 B[loadDataModel]
 C[lintFilterObject]
 D[parseFilterObject]
 E[solveGraphConnections]
 F[compileFilter]
 G[get]

 A --> B
 B --> G
 G --> C
 C --> D
 D --> E
 E --> F
 F --> G

 style G fill:#fff3e0
","style":"notebook"}
